prestazioni: Engine swap to a VQ37VHR (3.7L V6, 330hp stock) with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, and a Tomei 4-2-1 titanium exhaust manifold for optimized spool and top-end power, targeting 500whp on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise tuning

Full KW Clubsport coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the JX35's 5-link rear suspension, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115) to eliminate compliance under hard cornering

Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) big brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines and Motul RBF660 brake fluid for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (JX35-specific, not a universal fitment) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, retaining OEM door handles for a stealth OEM+ look

Custom 22x10.5 ET20 front and 22x12.5 ET25 rear forged wheels from Work Emotion CR Kiwami in a matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/22 front, 315/25/22 rear) for aggressive stance and grip

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec) front seats in Alcantara/leather, a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (bolt-in, 6-point, TIG-welded) painted in Nissan Racing Orange (code: 309), and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub
